title: Archero 2
notes:
1. Added Legendary Heroes Demeter and Artemis and exclusive Skins.
2. Added Guild Raid, Camp Visit, Friendly Duel, Charm System, Titles, and Rankings.
3. Rumble Ladder S3 begins with the new 3v3 Football Rumble mode.
4. Added Gear & Rune Lock
5. Unlocked Shackled Jungle 1101-1300, Campaign 161-170, and Hard 146-155.
6. Added defensive bonuses in Peak Arena.
7. Improved Guild Expedition stats, event chat, and scoring.
8. Reduced chapter difficulty and fixed various issues.

title: Kingdom Guard:Tower Defense TD
notes:
[Fixes]
1. Fixed an issue where the Pagoda popup displayed abnormally in Russian language in Ancient Forest Treasure Hunt.
2. Fixed an issue where the background image for Special Quality in BOUNTY QUESTS for Secret Task Force displayed abnormally.

title: Magic Sort!
notes:
Are you ready for a magical new update?

-New 100 levels!
-Bug Fixes & Improvements

title: Tears of Themis
notes:
-HoYoLAB Added to Sharing Channels
After the update, HoYoLAB will be added to the sharing screen. Attorneys can directly share game content to HoYoLAB from within the game.
-Invitation System Improvements
Increased the maximum number of Invitations that can be set to automatically rotate on the Main Screen.
Added "Select All" and "Reset" functions to the Invitation settings screen, allowing for one-tap selection or deselection of all owned Invitations.
-Added a Favorite feature. Favorited cards

title: Empires & Puzzles: Match-3 RPG
notes:
∙ Kalevala is back with new Heroes and Costumes
∙ Call the Garrison Guard! Goblin Village has been overrun by Scoundrels!
∙ Play through the epic conclusion of our first Dragon Adventure
∙ Various improvements and bug fixes
